use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OR PROPHYLAXIS OF ANGINA PECTORIS AND ARRHYTHMIA

indications.text:
Oral contraceptives are indicated for the prevention of pregnancy in women who elect to use this
product as a method of contraception. Oral contraceptives are highly effective. Table I lists the typical
accidental pregnancy rates for users of combination oral contraceptives and other methods of
cont...
